event: family history of sudden death in maternal uncle
coved-type ST elevation in V1 and V2
admitted to the intensive care unit
suspected septic shock from ulcerative colitis exacerbation
CT scan showed a high-density area in the descending colon
contrast-enhanced CT revealed a round low-density area of his liver
Tc scintigraphy abnormal uptake in the anterior mediastinum
implantation of an implantable cardioverter defibrillator (ICD) was performed
ECG and serum calcium level were followed up and treated
pathological diagnosis was determined for an ectopic parathyroid adenoma
CT and magnetic resonance imaging revealed tumors in the pituitary
CT and magnetic resonance imaging revealed tumors in the adrenal glands
